title: On Music, Sound Effects and Story
creator: Jonathan Blow
description: A direct explanation of why The Witness avoids a conventional musical score and minimizes explicit story delivery.
useful: A first-party design argument that can be compared against the finished game's priorities.

manualLinkStatus.note: Official article opened successfully in a browser; the site rejects some automated checks.

audience: Creative directors, audio designers, and critics examining deliberate omission as a design choice.
learning: Understand the argument for omitting a musical score
Relate sound strategy to attention and perception
Evaluate story delivery against a game's larger purpose
